hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams consolidate provider checks into auditable compliance decisions with case management, evidence preservation, and regulatory rule alignment.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to create clear, auditable decisions when provider outputs remain isolated across multiple systems. This fragmentation slows reviews, weakens traceability and complicates audit and regulatory reporting processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, reviewer actions, decision logs and evidence into one operational workflow so compliance teams can produce clear audit trails and defensible regulatory reports.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY routes compliance checks through rules, case reviews, decision logs and evidence preservation to support documented decisions and audit-ready reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Structured compliance decisions
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented compliance checks into clear workflows that preserve evidence, document decisions and support audit-ready reviews for regulated digital asset businesses.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a controlled layer connecting provider outputs, audit evidence and deployment governance to support scalable, documented compliance decisions.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support compliance decision workflows for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance checks are structured into case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence is preserved for audit-ready compliance reports
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect in multi-jurisdiction workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening provider outputs into structured reviews, decisions, cases, evidence and reporting workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates provider results, applies internal policies, routes cases, records decisions and links alerts with compliance rules to streamline structured decision workflows for AML operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence with audit-ready records to support defensible reviews and traceability throughout the compliance lifecycle.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into one operational compliance stack without disrupting established vendor relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying providers but complements them by structuring their output into auditable workflows, decision records and reporting workflows support.
final_title: Turn compliance checks into documented decisions
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into structured cases, rule updates, evidence and audit-ready compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
